# TensorTrack

> TensorTrack is a structured AI engineering learning platform that takes developers from Python basics to building production AI systems.

## What it is
A gamified, first-principles curriculum for AI engineering with XP tracking, streaks, and 100+ curated resources. Free to use.

## Curriculum Tracks (in order)
1. Python for AI — fundamentals, concurrency, async, generators
2. Statistics & Math — probability, linear algebra, calculus for ML
3. Classical Machine Learning — scikit-learn, supervised/unsupervised learning
4. Deep Learning — neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, PyTorch
5. Large Language Models — transformers, fine-tuning, RLHF, evaluation
6. RAG Systems — vector databases, chunking, retrieval, reranking
7. AI Agents — tool use, planning, memory, multi-agent systems
8. System Design for AI — scalability, MLOps, deployment, monitoring

## Resource Sources
Content curated from: fast.ai, Andrej Karpathy lectures, Kaggle, Hugging Face docs, Papers with Code, RealPython, Google DeepMind research.

## Target Audience
- Software engineers transitioning into AI/ML roles
- CS students preparing for AI engineer interviews
- Developers who want to go beyond API wrappers to real AI engineering

## URL
https://tensor-track.vercel.app

## Contact
